name: symbio
description: Lightweight single-server monitoring dashboard and host agent.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix mothership install && npm --prefix agent install
scripts.check: npm --prefix mothership run check && npm --prefix agent run check
scripts.test: npm --prefix mothership test && npm --prefix agent test
scripts.audit: npm --prefix mothership audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix agent audit --audit-level=high
